places.name: Lepakshi — Veerabhadra Temple
places.modernInfo: 16th century temple with India's largest Nandi bull. The famous hanging pillar defies gravity. Vijayanagara architecture.

scenes.title: The Brahmanda — cosmic egg
scenes.description: The Brahmanda Purana describes the universe as a cosmic egg (Brahmanda) floating in infinite space. Within it are seven continents, seven oceans, the Milky Way and countless universes — all contained within Brahma's single breath.

scenes.title: Jatayu falls at Lepakshi
scenes.description: The Brahmanda Purana places Jatayu's fall at Lepakshi. When the wounded eagle fell after fighting Ravana, Ram cradled him here. 'Le Pakshi' means 'Rise, O Bird' in Telugu — the words Ram spoke to the dying Jatayu.
